description: Manage workspace membership and audit history.

userStories.title: Add workspace membership and audit-log schema
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership and audit records stored so that invites, role changes, and removals can be tracked safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace membership records support invite state, role, and active or revoked status
Audit-log entries can record membership changes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Invite members by email
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that I can add people without editing the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Inviting a member by email creates a pending membership record
Invalid email addresses are rejected
An audit entry is recorded for the invite
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Change member role
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so that access matches responsibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Member roles can be changed between viewer, editor, and admin
Role changes are persisted for the selected member
An audit entry is recorded for the role change
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke access so that removed members can no longer enter the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoking access disables the selected member membership
Revoked members no longer count as active workspace members
An audit entry is recorded for the revocation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: View recent membership changes in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can audit access management.
acceptanceCriteria: The workspace settings page shows recent membership changes from the audit log
Entries include the actor, action, target member, and timestamp
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
